false_positives.justification: No division present in registry contracts
Tautology checks are intentional defensive guards

notes.reentrancy_benign: TrustPolicyRegistry uses ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable on all external-call paths
notes.access_control: All state-mutating functions are protected by onlyRole modifiers (AccessControlUpgradeable)
notes.integer_overflow: All contracts use Solidity ^0.8.25 with built-in overflow protection
